news.headline: Indonesia caps ride-hailing commission fees at 8% in ‘radical correction’ of sector
news.summary:
Indonesia is moving to reshape its ride-hailing industry from the inside, with officials saying the state has acquired stakes in app companies as President Prabowo Subianto seeks to raise drivers’ earnings and rein in commission fees.

news.headline: 'The highest tensions have been' as US, Iran trade fire in Hormuz
news.summary: The US military said it fired on Iranian forces and sank six small boats targeting civilian ships as it moved to reopen the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, while the United Arab Emirates said it had come under attack from Iran for the first time since a fragile ceasefire took hold in early April. news.headline: Stars embrace art-inspired fashion at Met Gala
news.summary: Celebrities including supermodel Heidi Klum and singer Beyoncé walked the carpet at the Met Gala on Monday — many of them unrecognizable as they leaned heavily into this year’s theme, ‘Fashion is art’.

news.headline: Airline's plan for fuel surcharge raises questions of legality
news.summary: As jet fuel prices continue to skyrocket, some airlines, such as Spanish budget carrier Volotea, have decided to add a fuel surcharge on tickets, even on those that have already been purchased. But while the idea may help offset rising costs, some have questioned its legality.
